The Discord message was mangled slightly (backtick-quoted inline code got eaten by bash substitution). The message went through successfully regardless. Here's the full summary:

---

**Root cause identified and resolved.**

The terminal-server.service Python/aiohttp process had been running for 39 minutes and gotten into a tight error loop — every incoming request was immediately throwing `ClientConnectionResetError: Cannot write to closing transport`, causing the process to spin at **90.9% CPU...(truncated)
